== Notes for [[Item:Q100516|Q100516]] ==

https://tablet.otzar.org/#/b/650161/p/-1/t/16670.9008621890806613/fs/T0fVS3422NXjVq4FLpCmLfVVMHtNhuzmn43SrATxKWR4/start/72/end/87/c


https://tablet.otzar.org/#/b/178897/p/-1/t/1668686638829/fs/N9VzJlu45uAQBxM6RWiZhbZFxiBsh1kLLbwhrNFbTRY5/start/42/end/45/c


https://tablet.otzar.org/#/b/633363/p/-1/t/1668686638829/fs/N9VzJlu45uAQBxM6RWiZhbZFxiBsh1kLLbwhrNFbTRY5/start/81/end/93/c

https://tablet.otzar.org/#/b/651656/p/-1/t/16850.44845894940559383/fs/cWLyPI8UDA3DvWzV4pEkEyn0UxAqtJNJPCRMmDk1tH1C/start/552/end/556/c


https://tablet.otzar.org/#/b/650684/p/-1/t/16850.44845894940559383/fs/yTT1nF9BRsn8ADAiu4FyaC1LC83EFPCOE9Uh0JPbfIsB/start/56145/end/57465/c

https://tablet.otzar.org/#/b/158289/p/-1/t/16850.44845894940559383/fs/cWLyPI8UDA3DvWzV4pEkEyn0UxAqtJNJPCRMmDk1tH1C/start/112/end/124/c

https://tablet.otzar.org/#/b/157580/p/-1/t/16850.44845894940559383/fs/cWLyPI8UDA3DvWzV4pEkEyn0UxAqtJNJPCRMmDk1tH1C/start/84/end/112/c

מכונה בשם רבנו יונה החסיד

'''בן דודו ומחותנו של רבנו משה בן נחמן,"הרמב"ן"'''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8AA9B51EFBBFA9822EF79916CB7EE
geni:6000000194835153821

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
